entry.title: IDC HSFEHQ12D0882 (P00010) awarded to NISTAC E, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MOD TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD IV AND ADMINISTRATIVE ACTION TO ADD LINE ITEM NUMBERS TO ALLOW PRISM MIGRATION - PUBLIC ASSISTANCE TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE CONTRACT (PA TAC III)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
